prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约13204名→11551名→10990名→8688名→8163名，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小），近5年累计前移约5041名；其中2024–2025年仅前移525名，前移速度明显放缓，2025年基准位次约8163名；该校在浙江省招生计划：2021–2024年均为127人，2025年缩减至107人，2026年进一步缩减至82人，较2025年减少25人、缩招约23.4%。大幅缩招意味着该校在浙投放名额显著减少，报考竞争加剧，位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北工业大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第21–25名区间（2025年第21名、2026年第23名），属于全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（校园安全事件），但该校作为国防七子之一、\"共和国总工程师的摇篮\"，整体社会形象正面稳固；抖音热度总排名第74位、评价\"一般\"，短视频曝光量中等；2021–2025年投档异常文件中未见该校断档或暴跌记录，录取走势平稳；第五轮学科评估中，航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、机械工程A、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，王牌专业对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类社会热度持续高热推荐，航空航天相关专业关注度高；浙江省2026年考生总数约40万人，较2025年29.1万人增长约37.6%，全省竞争显著加剧；西北工业大学位于陕西西安，非本省高校，在浙江无地域招生倾斜；该校在浙江招生计划近年持续缩减，2026年仅82人，属外省985高校在浙正常投放规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8163名、2026年大幅缩招约23.4%（推动位次前移）、全省考生增长约37.6%（部分抵消缩招效应）、学校层次顶尖且王牌专业热度高，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年继续前移，预测最低位次约7219名，波动区间6719–7719名。

- 计算机类（计算机科学拔尖基地班）
- 航空航天类（智慧三航拔尖班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约7219名，区间6719–7719名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间上限（如6700名以内）可重点冲击一档的航空航天类（陈士橹飞天班/黄玉珊航空班）和计算机科学拔尖基地班；位次接近区间下限（如7700名左右）应以三档专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Zhejiang Province were approximately 13204 → 11551 → 10990 → 8688 → 8163, showing a continuous forward trend (decreasing rank numbers), with a cumulative forward movement of about 5041 positions over the past 5 years; from 2024 to 2025, it only moved forward by 525 positions, indicating a significant slowdown in the forward movement speed, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being about 8163; the university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang Province: 127 students each year from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 107 in 2025, and further reduced to 82 in 2026, a decrease of 25 students compared to 2025, a reduction of about 23.4%. The significant reduction in enrollment means that the university's allocated spots in Zhejiang have notably decreased, intensifying competition for admission, putting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been stable in the 21st–25th range in recent years (21st in 2025, 23rd in 2026), placing it among the top universities nationwide, strongly attracting high-scoring students; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative (campus safety incidents), but as one of the 'Seven Sons of National Defense' and the 'Cradle of Chief Engineers of the Republic', its overall social image is positive and stable; its Douyin heat ranking is 74th overall with an evaluation of 'average', indicating moderate short video exposure; no records of gaps or sharp drops were found in the 2021–2025 admission anomaly files, showing a stable admission trend; in the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Aerospace Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-, totaling 7 disciplines rated A- or above, highlighting strong engineering capabilities, with flagship programs strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Computer-related, Electronic Information/Communication-related programs continue to be highly recommended with sustained social heat, and Aerospace-related programs have high attention; the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province for 2026 is about 400,000, an increase of about 37.6% compared to 291,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition across the province; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university in Zhejiang, with no geographical admission preference in Zhejiang; the university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang has been continuously reduced in recent years, with only 82 spots in 2026, which is a normal scale for an out-of-province 985 university in Zhejiang.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 8163 in 2025, a significant enrollment reduction of about 23.4% in 2026 (pushing rankings forward), a province-wide candidate increase of about 37.6% (partially offsetting the enrollment reduction effect), the university's top-tier level and high popularity of flagship programs, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move forward compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 7219, and a fluctuation range of 6719–7719.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 7219, range 6719–7719. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 programs as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship programs as a stretch, and use Tier 3 programs as safety; for rankings significantly better than the upper limit (e.g., within 6700), focus on Tier 1 Aerospace (Chen Shilu Feitian Class/Huang Yushan Aviation Class) and Computer Science Top-Notch Base Class; for rankings near the lower limit (e.g., around 7700), prioritize Tier 3 programs to ensure admission.
